title: selaginella hartii
intro: Selaginella hartii is a species of spore-producing, vascular plant commonly known as the Hart's tongue fern, belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selaginella hartii include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to release its active compounds, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
